pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 14, 54; export_result.sh line 24; verifier.py line 27. Email uses RFC 2606 reserved example.com domain.
Code analysis: task.json description mentions 'Sent Requests tab or list'; verifier.py lines 65-72 checks for Requests screen context; export_result.sh line 31-32 verifies context presence.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Android emulator with a fabricated email address 'ghost_pilot@example.com' (RFC 2606 example.com domain) as the target friend request recipient. The task requires the agent to navigate to and interact with the 'Sent Requests' UI context within the Flight Crew View application to cancel/withdraw the pending request. No real data sources or external APIs are involved.
